response.overview: King David was a historical figure who is revered in Christianity. He is known for his faith in God  and his role as a king of Israel. According to the Hebrew Bible, David was a shepherd who became the second king of Israel and is considered to be a ancestor of Jesus. He is known for his bravery and leadership, and is revered as a prophet of Jehova. David is remembered for his trust in God and his faith in the face of challenges and adversity. There are many lessons that can be learned from the story of David and his trust in God  The importance of faith and trust in God, David is remembered for his unwavering faith in God and his trust in His plan, even in the face of challenges and adversity.

production_companies.name: Watch Tower Bible and Tract Society of Pennsylvania

response.title: David—He Trusted in God
